name: Pork Chops with Sauerkraut

ingredients.item: Pork is frequently served in northern Greece, particularly in Kastoria.
tomato paste, diluted in ½ cup water
In skillet melt butter and brown pork chops well.
Drain sauerkraut and place in a casserole.
Add diluted tomato paste, olive oil, and paprika or caraway seeds to sauerkraut.
Place chops on top of sauerkraut and add pan drippings.
Cover and simmer for about 1 hour, or until chops are very tender.
